commands.evidence: All repository verification layers passed with zero failures

evidence: Claude project model is fable mapped to gpt-5.6-sol with medium effort; Codex is fixed to gpt-5.6-sol/low.
OpenCode primary and non-Critical fallback policies, four lanes, five-writer cap and Critical fail-closed behavior are machine tested.
State revision checks, atomic writes, JSONL audit, immutable accepted results and hashed context snapshots are implemented and tested.
All changed files are within the approved task boundary; business Spec and product components are unchanged.
Git status and both monitored OpenCode plan directories were unchanged after verification.
known_risks: Provider cost and cache metrics remain not_observed when the CLI does not expose authoritative usage fields.
Codex project-local per-tool hooks are not installed globally; enforcement uses workspace sandbox, pre-dispatch realpath checks and frozen diff checks.
